steps.title: Introduce the list of names
steps.content: The sentence first identifies two other Black Americans who served in Congress, then names Ralph Harold Metcalfe and Alton R. Waldon Jr. The punctuation must introduce those names as a list.

steps.title: Reject non-list punctuation
steps.content: Choice B uses a semicolon, but the names are not an independent clause. Choice C creates a sentence fragment after the period. Choice D gives no punctuation to introduce the list. The answer is A.
